data.content: Implemented profile display name consistency: replaced 'Knots (autopilot)' and 'Workflow (autopilot)' labels with human-friendly names (Autopilot, Semiauto, etc.) via profileDisplayName(). Fixed default profile not honored in create dialog by keying BeatForm on defaultProfileId. Added info icon + lightbox dialog in both beat-form and settings-defaults explaining each profile. Updated 3 test files for new label format. All relevant tests pass (282/282).
